svg.text: The Greater Discourse on the Simile of the Heartwood
At each layer, one may stop or press inward
— the heartwood alone is the goal —
After each accomplishment, the same choice arises
Not delighted by it, nor fulfilled in intention
It is impossible for that bhikkhu to fall away from that liberation.
aṭṭhānametaṁ anavakāso yaṁ so bhikkhu tāya asamayavimuttiyā parihāyetha
